DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Citibank N.A.'s demurrer to the Complaint is OVERRULED but this action is ordered STAYED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prior to the time set for hearing, Defendant shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order containing the above text verbatim.

No proposed order received. Defendant failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Continued To Apr-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2026 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Stay; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Carniece Kathrine Hall-Johnson Iso Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CARNEICE HALL-JOHNSON's Motion For Relief From Stay.

Plaintiff Carneice Kathrine Hall-Johnson's Motion For Relief From Stay is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing the stay established by stipulation and Order filed June 13, 2024, is lifted. The case is retuned to the active civil case list/master calendar. Defendant Citibank, N.A.'s response to the complaint is due within 28 days of this order.

Defendant's argument that the case should be dismissed as duplicative is not properly before the court at this time.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the above text and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
